describe: LIVE-WIRE: a real ctx.db.insert via runtime.run that would exceed the trusted workspace quota is REJECTED at the command boundary with a typed ResourceLimitExceeded + a compaction/cleanup/export suggestion; the prior records and the quota.status usage are byte-for-byte intact and the rejected record never landed (reject-not-delete, never silent deletion).

seed_runs.title: seed task alpha keep me intact
seed task beta keep me intact too
seed task gamma stays put as well

write_run.title: this insert does not fit and must be rejected
